readback_semantics.cpu: scaling_cur_freq = cpufreq driver cached value (not hardware)
readback_semantics.gpu: devfreq cur_freq = clk framework software state (not hardware)
readback_semantics.emc: debugfs rate = BPMP bookkeeping; pto_counter snapshots in <pair>.meta.json are the hardware truth

note: probes run SCHED_FIFO 50 on the probe core; orchestrator pinned to cores 0-3. CPU+GPU otherwise dynamic; EMC locked only during emc pairs. Run with the board otherwise idle.
